channel.title: Shady Scanner
channel.description: AI-powered security scanning for websites, APIs, and business tools. Find vulnerabilities before attackers do.

item.title: Top 5 AI Security Threats in 2026
item.description: The threat landscape has evolved rapidly. Here are the five AI-powered security threats every business needs to know about in 2026.

item.title: SSL Certificates Explained: Why Your Site Needs HTTPS
item.description: SSL certificates are the foundation of web security. Here's what they are, why they matter, and how to make sure yours is configured correctly.

item.title: How to Audit Your Website Vulnerabilities
item.description: A step-by-step guide to auditing your website for common security vulnerabilities before attackers find them first.
